bird.name: 赤胸杜鵑
bird.summary: 赤胸杜鵑（學名：Cuculus solitarius）是杜鵑科杜鵑屬的其中一種。這種中型鳥類棲息於撒哈拉以南的非洲地區。在阿非利卡語中，因其鳴叫聲而被稱為「Piet-my-vrou」。 描述 赤胸杜鵑是一種中型杜鵑，體長約31公分。雄鳥背部呈石板灰色，喉部與頭側為淺灰色，尾羽為…

locations.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
locations.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲（英語：Sub-Saharan Africa）指撒哈拉沙漠以南的非洲地區，也稱黑非洲（Negro Africa）。自然地理上與衣索比亞界高度重疊。政治上，包括了所有或部分领土位于撒哈拉沙漠以南的国家（苏丹除外，尽管位于撒哈拉…

relations.subject: 赤胸杜鵑
relations.evidence: It is a medium-sized bird found in Africa, south of the Sahara

relations.subject: 赤胸杜鵑
relations.evidence: It is found in Angola, Benin, Botswana, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ivory Coast, Equatorial Guinea, Eswatini, Ethiopia, Gabon, Gambia, Ghana, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Kenya, Lesotho, Liberia, Malawi, Mali, Mozambique, Namibia, Nigeria, Rwanda, Senegal, Sierra Leone, Somalia, South Africa, Sudan, Tanzania, Togo, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. In Southern Africa it is a common breeding migrant, found throughout the area except for the drier west
